        (if a ≤ pivot then (a :: (partitionLE pivot xs).fst, (partitionLE pivot xs).snd)
          else ((partitionLE pivot xs).fst, (partitionLE pivot xs).snd)).fst +

case pos
pivot a x : Nat
xs : List Nat
ih :
  let p := partitionLE pivot xs;
  count a p.fst + count a p.snd = count a xs
hx : ¬x ≤ pivot
hxa : x = a
⊢ count a
        (if a ≤ pivot then (a :: (partitionLE pivot xs).fst, (partitionLE pivot xs).snd)
          else ((partitionLE pivot xs).fst, (partitionLE pivot xs).snd)).fst +
      count a
        (if a ≤ pivot then (a :: (partitionLE pivot xs).fst, (partitionLE pivot xs).snd)
          else ((partitionLE pivot xs).fst, (partitionLE pivot xs).snd)).snd =
    1 + count a xs

partition_length : ∀ (pivot : Nat) (xs : List Nat),
  have p := partitionLE pivot xs;
  p.fst.length + p.snd.length = xs.length
partition_left_allLe : ∀ (pivot : Nat) (xs : List Nat),
  have p := partitionLE pivot xs;
  allLe pivot p.fst
partition_right_allGt : ∀ (pivot : Nat) (xs : List Nat),
  have p := partitionLE pivot xs;
  allGt pivot p.snd
partition_count : ∀ (pivot a : Nat) (xs : List Nat),
  have p := partitionLE pivot xs;
  count a p.fst + count a p.snd = count a xs
partition_spec : ∀ (pivot : Nat) (xs : List Nat),
  have p := partitionLE pivot xs;
  p.fst.length + p.snd.length = xs.length ∧
    allLe pivot p.fst ∧ allGt pivot p.snd ∧ ∀ (a : Nat), count a p.fst + count a p.snd = count a xs
